spec.title: Hook p95
spec.description: Short-window hook latency across the local hook service.

spec.expr: ((histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(harness_spanmetrics_duration_milliseconds_bucket{service_name="harness-hook"}[5m]))) and on() (sum(rate(harness_spanmetrics_calls_total{service_name="harness-hook"}[5m])) > 0)) or on() vector(0))

spec.title: Harness Stress Correlation
spec.description: Correlate Harness request rate and HTTP latency before drilling into runtime surfaces.

spec.expr: ((histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(harness_daemon_http_duration_milliseconds_bucket[5m]))) and on() (sum(rate(harness_daemon_http_duration_milliseconds_count[5m])) > 0)) or on() vector(0))
((histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(harness_monitor_http_request_duration_ms_bucket[5m]))) and on() (sum(rate(harness_monitor_http_request_duration_ms_count[5m])) > 0)) or on() vector(0))

spec.title: Process State Pressure
spec.description: Process state mix over time to spot stalls, buildup, or zombie churn.

spec.title: Top Tracked Process CPU
spec.description: Top tracked executables by CPU over the investigation window.

spec.title: Top Tracked Process RSS
spec.description: Top tracked executables by resident memory over the investigation window.

spec.title: Top Slow Routes
spec.description: Rank the slowest daemon and monitor routes in the current investigation window.

spec.title: Daemon HTTP p95
spec.description: Daemon HTTP p95 over the active investigation window.

spec.expr: ((histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(harness_daemon_http_duration_milliseconds_bucket[5m]))) and on() (sum(rate(harness_daemon_http_duration_milliseconds_count[5m])) > 0)) or on() vector(0))

spec.title: Monitor HTTP p95
spec.description: Monitor HTTP p95 over the active investigation window.

spec.expr: ((histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(harness_monitor_http_request_duration_ms_bucket[5m]))) and on() (sum(rate(harness_monitor_http_request_duration_ms_count[5m])) > 0)) or on() vector(0))

spec.title: Thermal Pressure Active
spec.description: Signals whether any non-nominal thermal pressure is active on the host.

spec.title: Running Processes
spec.description: Current running process count for the workstation.

spec.title: Zombie Processes
spec.description: Current zombie process count for the workstation.

spec.title: Top CPU Process
spec.description: Tracked executable currently consuming the most CPU.

spec.title: Top RSS Process
spec.description: Tracked executable currently consuming the most resident memory.

spec.title: Host Stress Correlation
spec.description: Correlate host CPU, memory, and disk pressure before drilling into the host board.

spec.title: CLI Span Rate
spec.description: Current Harness CLI span throughput across the active investigation window.

spec.title: Daemon Req / s
spec.description: Current daemon HTTP request throughput across all routes.

spec.title: User Interactions / 5m
spec.description: Recent user interaction volume from the monitor UI.

spec.title: API Errors / 5m
spec.description: Recent monitor API error count over the last five minutes.

spec.title: Active Tasks
spec.description: Current active monitor task count.

spec.title: Cache Miss %
spec.description: Monitor cache miss ratio over the last five minutes.

spec.expr: ((((sum(clamp_min((last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_misses_total[5m]) - last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_misses_total[5m] offset 5m)) or last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_misses_total[5m]), 0)) / clamp_min(sum(clamp_min((last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_hits_total[5m]) - last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_hits_total[5m] offset 5m)) or last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_hits_total[5m]), 0)) + sum(clamp_min((last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_misses_total[5m]) - last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_misses_total[5m] offset 5m)) or last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_misses_total[5m]), 0)), 0.000001)) * 100) or on() vector(0)))

spec.title: Request Pressure by Surface
spec.description: Compare runtime, daemon, monitor, and WebSocket traffic at glance.

spec.title: Reliability Signals
spec.description: Track transport and client-facing errors before drilling into specialist dashboards.
